---
title: "nomp: A Framework for Building Domain Specific Compilers"
date: 2026-06-10"
year: 2026
pdf: ""
venue: "Arxiv 2026"
award: ""
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2606.12650"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Thilina Ratnayaka
  - name: Kaushik Kulkarni
  - name: Nipuna Fernando
  - name: Pubudu Hewavitharana
  - name: Hirumal Priyashan
  - name: Poorna Gunathilaka
  - name: Nagitha Abeywickrema
  - name: Ravindu Hirimuthugoda
  - name: Tarun Prabhu
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Sanath Jayasena
categories:
  - Manuscript
description: ""
---
